---
title: Teaching Experience
---

I teach across microeconomics, econometrics, and quantitative methods, with experience spanning undergraduate and MSc instruction, tutorials, seminars, and course design.

::: {.paper-card}
### University of Manchester

**Teaching Associate (2025 – 2026)**  

::: {.bubble-row}
`Intermediate Microeconomics`
`Mathematical Economics`
`Applied Microeconometrics (MSc)`
`Econometrics`
:::

Delivered lectures and teaching support in core economics and econometrics modules, and redesigned the **MSc Applied Microeconometrics** course to improve structure, empirical coherence, and student engagement.

**Teaching Assistant (2021 – 2025)**  

::: {.bubble-row}
`Intermediate Microeconomics`
`Applied Microeconometrics (MSc)`
`Microeconomics I & II`
`Introduction to Mathematical Economics`
:::
:::

::: {.paper-card}
### Lebanese American University

**Teaching Assistant (2016 – 2020)**  

::: {.bubble-row}
`Intermediate Microeconomics`
`Intermediate Macroeconomics`
`Econometrics`
`Mathematical Methods for Economics`
`Financial Accounting`
`Managerial Finance`
`Microeconomic Theory`
`Macroeconomic Theory`
`Managerial Statistics`
:::
:::

::: {.paper-card}
### Antonine Sisters School

**Teacher (2016 – 2017)**  

::: {.bubble-row}
`Economics`
:::
:::
